title: arabis boryi
intro: Arabis boryi, also known as Bory's rockcress, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Arabis boryi are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of ailments.
